title: Working with Development Objects
text: Working with Development Objects Although development objects can be quite different in content and purpose, the way you create, edit and delete them in the Uniface IDE is essentially the same. Note: When you make a change to a development object, such as setting a property or adding a sub-object, it is automatically saved. Note: Undo and Redo functionality is available only when editing code in the Write Script and Design Layout worksheets. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
